name: Exa MCP Server
what_it_does: Official MCP server from Exa that provides AI assistants with web search, code context retrieval, company research, people search, URL crawling, and an autonomous deep research agent. Available as both a hosted MCP endpoint and a local npm package.
use_cases: AI-powered web search with clean, processed content returned directly
Finding programming examples from GitHub and Stack Overflow via code context search
Automated company research and business intelligence gathering
Deep autonomous research that generates comprehensive reports on complex topics
not_for: Free unlimited web search (Exa API has usage-based pricing)
Replacing a general search engine for casual browsing
Users who need completely free search tooling
best_when: You need high-quality, AI-optimized web search results integrated into an MCP-compatible AI workflow, and are willing to pay for Exa API usage.
avoid_when: You need free search capabilities, or your use case is simple enough that a basic web search tool suffices.

auth.notes: Requires EXA_API_KEY environment variable. API key obtained from Exa dashboard. Hosted endpoint handles auth via the key parameter.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free credits on signup for evaluation
pricing.notes: MIT licensed open source server, but the Exa API it connects to is a paid service with usage-based pricing. Free tier credits available for initial testing.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Well-documented with clear setup instructions for 15+ platforms. Hosted MCP endpoint eliminates local setup complexity. Configurable tool selection allows agents to expose only needed capabilities. Official vendor-maintained server.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: All operations are read-only searches and crawls - naturally idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: API usage incurs costs - agents making many search calls can rack up charges
Deep researcher is async (start/check pattern) which some agents handle poorly
Some tools disabled by default - must explicitly enable via config parameter
Hosted endpoint URL requires tool selection via query parameters
